summary: Punchy, well‑balanced audience capture with a great‑sounding first set and a slightly muddier second set.
review: The reviewer rates this Nak300 pull highly, calling it the go‑to source for the complete show. The first set is described as crisp and punchy while the second set becomes a bit muddier, but overall the recording is well balanced. No comments were made about the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review emphasizes strong recording quality; no performance details, so rating is based mainly on audio assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Punchy and well balanced sound; first set crisp, second set a bit muddier.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review does not comment on musical performance or set pacing.
